commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5e24059d6d36bc624804f9d8d5969ec2267ccd07)
commands.review_summary:
This stacked PR converts gateway service and adjacent doctor maintenance paths into structured health repair checks with note routing, service-effect metadata, dry-run/diff plumbing, and focused tests.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence path: return `serviceRewriteBlocked: true` with remaining config issues, then the structured repair reports an update effect even though the legacy repair helper returns before service mutation; the note replay issue follows from the repair note sink and result replay path.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer and contributor handling because the PR is protected/stacked, has concrete P2 repair-output bugs, and still lacks contributor-provided live service-manager proof.

target.title: Doctor: structure gateway service repairs
target.body:
## Goal

Convert gateway service maintenance to structured doctor repairs while keeping service-manager work represented as service effects, not fake file/config diffs.

Gateway service repair is inherently platform/service-manager work. This PR’s goal is to make that work detectable, previewable, note-aware, and validateable through the structured contract without pretending launchd/systemd operations are config patches.

## Scope

| Check | Goal | Behavior |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Extra gateway services | Detect and clean up legacy or gateway-like services from the structured path. | Detect is silent; repair delegates to `repairExtraGatewayServices(...)`. |
| Gateway service config | Detect and repair service config drift from the structured path. | Detect is silent; repair delegates to `repairGatewayServiceConfig(...)`. |
| Gateway platform notes | Preserve operator context without detect-time printing. | Repair notes flow through `DoctorPrompter.note(...)` into ordered repair notes. |

## Structured Repair Matrix

| Check | Detect / lint behavior | Repair behavior | Dry-run / effects | Note / validation proof |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Extra gateway services | Detects gateway-like/legacy services without printing. | Converted repair calls `repairExtraGatewayServices(...)`; legacy `maybeScanExtraGatewayServices(...)` delegates for old contribution paths. | `would-remove-legacy-gateway-service` and `remove-legacy-gateway-service` service effects. | Detect-after verifies removed legacy services are no longer reported in focused tests. |
| Gateway service config | Detects service config drift silently. | Converted repair calls `repairGatewayServiceConfig(...)`; legacy `maybeRepairGatewayServiceConfig(...)` delegates for old contribution paths. | `would-update-gateway-service-config` and `update-gateway-service-config` service effects. | Focused tests cover repair, dry-run, effects, and validation. |
| Gateway platform notes | Platform/service caveats are structured findings or repair notes, not detect-time prints. | Timing-sensitive repair presentation goes through shared `DoctorPrompter.note(...)`. | No synthetic config/file diffs for service-manager work. | Structured adapter routes notes into ordered `repairNotes`. |
| Install-plan warnings | Suppressed during detect/audit and lint. | Emitted during actual repair when the install plan is built for mutation. | Side-effect metadata stays explicit. | Tests cover silent detect/lint behavior and repair-time note routing. |

## Proof

| Proof | Result |
| --- | --- |
| `doctor-gateway-services`, core checks, health contributions, repair flow tests | 4 files / 94 tests passed. |
| Formatting check over touched files | Passed. |
| `git diff --check` | Passed. |

## Out of Scope

- Live launchd/systemd mutation proof for this stacked branch.
- Changing gateway service policy or install semantics.
- Emitting synthetic file diffs for service-manager operations.

## Real Behavior Proof

Behavior addressed: Gateway service doctor repairs now run through structured health checks at their original doctor contribution position, with silent detect/lint behavior, ordered repair presentation, detect-after validation, and concrete side-effect metadata.

Real environment tested: WSL source checkout on branch head `5e24059d6d36bc624804f9d8d5969ec2267ccd07` using focused Vitest coverage and formatting/whitespace checks.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused gateway service, core check, health contribution, and repair-flow tests; touched-file formatting; whitespace check.

Evidence after fix: Focused test output showed all selected tests passing: 4 files / 94 tests. Formatting and whitespace checks passed.

Observed result after fix: structured gateway repairs report service effects, preserve note ordering, keep detect/lint silent, and validate repaired findings.

What was not tested: live launchd/systemd install. This proof uses mocked service managers and command helpers.
target.author: giodl73-repo
